en: Hey guys, my name is Rudy Ponko, and I play Scotty in Reminders of Him.
ko: 안녕하세요, 저는 루디 폰코이고 '그를 떠올리며'에서 스코티 역입니다.

en: This story means so much to all of us, and we're so excited for you to experience it on the big screen.
ko: 이 이야기는 우리 모두에게 소중하고, 큰 스크린에서 보실 수 있어 기대돼요.

en: So make sure to get your tickets now. We'll see you at the movies.
ko: 지금 바로 티켓 예매하세요. 극장에서 만나요.

en: But in the meantime, I'm gonna read some comments about myself, which I just love doing so much.
ko: 그동안 제 댓글을 읽어볼게요, 진짜 좋아하거든요.

en: Um, here we go, with from Annie.box,
I cannot wait to see Rudy play in this movie, aw.
I just want to know, or I just, I can't read.
I just know he's going to do such a good job playing Scotty, so excited.
ko: 스코티 역을 진짜 잘할 거 같아, 기대돼.

en: Annie, thank you. It means a lot to me.
This is so beautiful. I can't wait to see how Rudy brings Scotty to life.
ko: 진짜 아름답다. 루디가 스코티를 어떻게 살릴지 기대돼.

en: I know he just put all of his hard work into this.
He is the perfect Scotty. He's gonna, my gosh guys, he's gonna have us in tears with his performance.
ko: 완벽한 스코티야. 세상에, 연기에 눈물 나게 할 거야.

en: Well, I sure hope so. Go see the movie, guys, and I hope you enjoy it.
ko: 그랬으면 좋겠네요. 영화 보러 가세요, 즐기시길 바래요.
